Sometimes I feel my voice get loud,
gakkeumeun nae moksoriga keojyeo
like I’m angry at the world,
machi sesange hwarado nan geotcheoreom
am I falling into a cloud?
gureum sogeuro tteoreojigo inneun geolkka?

gogeul sseul ttaemada, nan noraee nareul sumgyeo
It's where I keep, all my truth all along.
geu ane neul nae jinsimeul ganjikhae wasseo

Hold on, don’t let it go,
beotyeojwo, noji marajwo
I’m scared but I’ll be slow,
museopjiman cheoncheonhi gabolge
Keep it quiet inside,
maeumeun joyonghi ane mudeodugo
But I know I’ll be alright.
geuraedo got gwaenchanajil georaneun geol ara

nae moksori deullini? naega sori chil ttae?

gireul ireosseo, hemaego isseo. nega piryohae
Hold me close, don’t let me go,
nal kkok anajwo, nal tteonaji ma
This is all I ever know.
naega aneun geon igeot ppuniya
When your voice gets high, I breathe
ne moksoriga deullyeoomyeon nan sumeul swil su isseo

naega beotiji mothal ttaedo,

urin neomeojigo, dasi ireonago

geureoge urineun gireul chajaga
